case_title: WOON CHUNG LAM et al VS. THOMAS C HUBSCHMAN et al

MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-04-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-27-2003 CONTINUED TO JUL-28-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-28-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
